title: Fig. 1 in Complete mitochondrial genome sequence of Bonasa sewerzowi (Galliformes: Phasianidae) and phylogenetic analysis
author: Li, Xue-Juan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Gene map of the B. sewerzowi mitochondrial genome. Transfer RNA genes are designated by single-letter amino acid codes. L1, L2, S1, and S2 denote trnL (uur), trnL (cun), trnS (ucn) and trnS (agy), respectively.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Gene map of the B. sewerzowi mitochondrial genome. Transfer RNA genes are designated by single-letter amino acid codes. L1, L2, S1, and S2 denote trnL (uur), trnL (cun), trnS (ucn) and trnS (agy), respectively.
